channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overwhelmed by Line bikes, 12th March
item.description:
Out of bay as usual

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37-41, Mortimer Street, Mayfair, City of Westminster

item.title: Vehicle Blocking Path, 12th March
item.description:
A van has parked on the pavement blocking the path for pedestrians.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Corner of Aldershot and Priory park Road, 12th March
item.description:
Big mattress left and 2 black bags 1 day
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London

item.title: Street Light not been working for 1 year, 12th March
item.description:
Street light outside number 54 Acton Street has been fixed for over 1 year now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Acton Street, King's Cross, Greater London

item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

Corner A2 slip rd/westhorne ave Thanks

item.title: Lots of rubbish dumped in bush on communal area, corner of vanbrugh park to Vanbrugh park road west,se3,se3, 12th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped including wooden crates dumped vanbrugh park end of vanbrugh pArk road west, in the bush on the communal grass area Please dispose
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vanbrugh Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple cracks on New N Popham Rd intersection, 12th March
item.description:
Multiple large cracks on the New North Road, Popham Road and Ecclesbourne Road intersection. Dangerous for cyclists and damaging for other road vehicles.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New North Road, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip in car park, 12th March
item.description:
Flytip car park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near corner, 12th March
item.description:
Long abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Fitzroy Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of domestic rubbish dumped (including bills), 12th March
item.description:
Loads of rubbish and domestic waste has been unlawfully dumped outside the flats at 68 High Street, Penge. It's a health hazard and is disgusting. It includes a lot of post from a particular house on nearby close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penge Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunk drain Essex Rd Bus Stop A, 12th March
item.description:
In front of the bin. It's sunk so deep a cyclist could face plant onto the ground. Rest of the bus lane further west isn't great either. Lots of pot holes for busses, taxis and bikes to avoid. Needs attention.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Essex Road, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All over, 12th March
item.description:
All over
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Shooters Hill Road, Kidbrooke, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Graffiti on the church, 12th March
item.description:
On the side of the church on mosslea road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of Rubbish dumped near Wyndham Road Railway Bridge, 12th March
item.description:
Rubbish bag is not tied and the Rubbish is being blown everywhere. I tried to put it in a more sheltered spot but the wind is too strong. There is also Rubbish from the bag strewn along the side of the road. Noticed it yesterday the 11/03/26.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Wyndham Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bt phone cable, 12th March
item.description:
BT phone line is hanging low In the bushes at no 21 going to no 17 could probably reach the line if tried to touch it

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 12th March
item.description:
A child’s buggy and some other bits and pieces has been left near this bus stop. Has been there for 2 days now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
